name: Seaman's Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 Fresh green chilies, de-seed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and flake the fish into a large bowl.
2. Mash the avocado with the rind and juice of the lime, then stir into the salmon. Add the tomatoes, cheese, chilies, and yogurt. Mix well while maintaining a rough texture. Season to taste.
3. Serve with tortilla chips, oven-baked potato skins, or crudites.
Cook's Note: To make oven-baked potato skins, bake 4 large potatoes until their centers are soft. Cut them in half and scoop out the potato pulp, reserving it for another recipe. Slice the skins into 3 or 4 strips and brush very liberally with olive or vegetable oil. Sprinkle with salt and bake in a pre-heated oven at 200°C (400°F), Gas mark 6 for 6-10 minutes, or until well crisped. These are best served hot.
Serves 10. Approx. 125 kcals per serving
